channel.title: Computer Vision on Arjun Gandhi
channel.description: Recent content in Computer Vision on Arjun Gandhi

item.title: Rbe 3001
item.description:
The Blurb

This project used computer vision and a 3DOF robot arm to sort orbs by color and size.

item.title: Ofs
item.description:
The Blurb

OFS (Optical Fiber Solutions) is a fiber manufacturing company. I’ve held two internships here (one in high school, and one the summer that I wrote this. My biggest project there was suggesting solutions and improvements to a fiber storage robot known as the ASRS.
